meta.goal: Self-improving option trading brain — ingest books, price, decide, risk-manage, adjust.

Core Foundations.snippet: GBM: dS = μS dt + σS dW. Risk-neutral: μ = r − q. Call c = S e^{-qτ} N(d1) − X e^{-rτ} N(d2). Use implied vol from market; adjust for dividends (Merton).

Chapter on Monte Carlo and Black-Scholes. Implied volatility drives pricing. Debit spread conversion is the primary adjustment for losing long 1DTE calls. Position sizing with fixed fractional risk. Opening range breakout and VWAP filters. Watch for volatility smile and fat tails. A

Numerical Methods.snippet: Monte Carlo European: simulate risk-neutral paths, discount E[payoff]. One-step exact lognormal terminal; antithetic (Z,-Z) reduces variance. Converges to BS as N→∞. Path-dependent options need multi-step paths.

Trading Strategies.snippet: Convert long call losing value → sell higher strike call = debit spread. Collects credit, lowers net debit and breakeven, caps upside.

Risk Management.snippet: Never risk >1–2% of capital per trade. Prefer defined-risk structures. Size with fixed-fractional or fractional Kelly. Model risk in crashes / fat tails.

Self-improve after 400 synthetic years: min_entry_score=71.8, min_pop=0.50, risk_per_trade=0.020, loss_trigger=0.44, use_adjustments=True, prefer_defined_risk=False. Metrics: mean_return=0.058, mean_dd=0.000, win_rate=0.631, fitness=125.69.

SPY 1DTE Playbook.snippet: SPY 1DTE: selective entry (trend + ORB/VWAP + vol filter), not every day. Losing long: primary convert to debit spread (sell OTM wing); secondary roll forward; tertiary hedge opposite; butterfly for recovery. No magic — adjustments lower breakeven / max loss, not guarantee profit. Backtest with commissions/slippage before live.

Evolved 1DTE gates from multi-century lab. Only trade when score≥70 and POP≥50%. Adjust losers at 43% premium loss. Prefer defined-risk structures for survival across regimes.
Evolved 1DTE gates from multi-century lab. Only trade when score≥72 and POP≥50%. Adjust losers at 44% premium loss. Prefer defined-risk structures for survival across regimes.

spy_bull_put_credit.when: mildly bullish or neutral, IV not crushed
spy_bull_put_credit.how: Sell put ~0.15–0.30 delta; buy lower put $1–5 wide. Max loss = width − credit.

spy_bear_call_credit.how: Sell call ~0.15–0.30 delta; buy higher call $1–5 wide.

spy_iron_condor.when: low expected move / high IV rank with range bias
spy_iron_condor.how: Bull put + bear call; short strikes OTM both sides

spy_1dte_debit_adjust.how: Sell OTM wing to convert to debit spread; lowers BE and risk
